_comment: Connection-manifest for the Sales department. verify-wiring.sh reads this and checks each required cfg_key.

connection_points.name: ghl-api-key
connection_points.description: GoHighLevel API key required for the Sales department to manage contacts, pipelines, and automations in GHL.

connection_points.name: ghl-location-id
connection_points.description: GHL location ID for the Sales department's CRM sub-account.
